---
title: LArTPC FM v1 Schema Notes
description: Pending schema notes for the LArTPC foundation-model dataset.
---

Schema details are pending.

This page should eventually define file formats, coordinate conventions, labels, splits, metadata fields, and example loading code.

## Expected coverage

| Area | Notes |
| --- | --- |
| Files | Package layout, event record naming, and shard conventions |
| Coordinates | Detector coordinate systems, pixel conventions, and geometry references |
| Labels | Semantic classes, instance IDs, and interaction grouping |
| Splits | Public training, validation, and hidden evaluation split policy |
| Examples | Minimal loading code and event-display preview data |
